mapper.insert: insert into user (username, password, name, openid, phone, gender, id_number, pic, status, is_member, member_level, member_expire_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{openid}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{idNumber}, #{pic}, #{status}, #{isMember}, #{memberLevel}, #{memberExpireTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
